title: Dissecting the market correction - the carry trade unravelling
section_path: Dissecting the market correction - the carry trade unravelling
section_path_text: Dissecting the market correction - the carry trade unravelling
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week
Stocks have fallen sharply and bonds have risen in the past three weeks. This is not due to an impending recession. Stocks are naturally correcting and bonds are rising due to worse-than-expected macroeconomic data.
